summary: Perfect sound captures a spirited show highlighted by Phil’s lead into a heartfelt “Might As Well” encore and memorable “Mack the Knife” performances.
review: The reviewer describes an enthusiastic concert in an old hockey arena, praising the flawless audio quality. Highlights include Phil Lesh guiding the band into a moving “Might As Well” encore and the curious decision to open and close with “Mack the Knife,” while Jerry’s emotive presence is noted throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review emphasizes an excellent performance and perfect sound, indicating a very high overall rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer explicitly states the sound was perfect, suggesting clear, balanced audio with no noticeable issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flowed from a strong opening (including Mack the Knife) to an emotionally charged encore led by Phil, with Jerry’s stage presence highlighted.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned as being onstage left and leaving his heart on the stage after the performance.
band_member_comments.Phil: Credited with leading the band into “Might As Well” for an encore.
